name: Sorrel-Tarragon Sauce for Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup finely chopped fresh sorrel or arugula
2 tablespoons chopped fresh tarragon or 1 teaspoon dried, crumbled
2 tablespoons chopped fresh chives or green onion tops
1 garlic clove, pressed (or use 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for at least four hours.
- This can be prepared up to one day in advance and kept refrigerated.
